passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Meningkatkan Energy Regen sebesar 12.8%/16%/19.2%/22.4%/25.6%. Saat mengenai target dengan Resonance Skill, meningkatkan Basic Attack DMG Bonus sebesar 10%/12.5%/15%/17.5%/20% selama 8/8/8/8/8 detik. Saat mengenai target dengan Basic Attack, meningkatkan Resonance Skill DMG Bonus sebesar 10%/12.5%/15%/17.5%/20% selama 8/8/8/8/8 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Melancarkan Resonance Liberation meningkatkan ATK sebesar 7.2%/11.1%/15.1%/19%/23% dan memberikan 10.8%/16.7%/22.6%/28.6%/34.5% Resonance Liberation DMG Bonus selama 15/15/15/15/15 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Saat Intro Skill dilancarkan, meningkatkan Resonance Liberation DMG Bonus sebesar 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% selama 15/15/15/15/15 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Meningkatkan ATK sebesar 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. Melancarkan Basic Attack memberikan efek berikut: Memberikan damage yang mengabaikan 8%/10%/12%/14%/16% DEF target dan memperkuat Spectro Frazzle DMG yang dihasilkan sebesar 50%/62.5%/75%/87.5%/100% selama 6/6/6/6/6 detik. Memicu ulang efek ini akan mengatur ulang durasinya.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Melancarkan Resonance Skill memberikan 6/7/8/9/10 Resonance Energy dan meningkatkan ATK sebesar 10%/12.5%/15%/17.5%/20% selama 16/16/16/16/16 detik. Efek ini dapat dipicu sekali setiap 20/20/20/20/20 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Meningkatkan ATK sebesar 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. Setelah memberikan Basic Attack DMG, pengguna mendapatkan 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% Spectro DMG Bonus selama 4/4/4/4/4 detik. Setiap kali setelah pengguna mengakibatkan Tune Strain - Shifting pada target, mereka mendapatkan 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% Basic Attack DMG Amplification dan Basic Attack DMG mereka mengabaikan 10%/12.5%/15%/17.5%/20% DEF target selama 6/6/6/6/6 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Saat Resonator melakukan dash atau dodge, meningkatkan ATK sebesar 8%/10%/12%/14%/16%. Meningkatkan Dodge Counter DMG sebesar 50%/62.5%/75%/87.5%/100% selama 8/8/8/8/8 detik. Saat Dodge Counter dilakukan, memulihkan 5%/6.25%/7.5%/8.75%/10% dari Max HP Resonator. Efek ini dapat dipicu 1/1/1/1/1 kali setiap 6/6/6/6/6 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Saat Resonance Liberation dilancarkan, memberikan 3/3/3/3/3 stack(s) Iron Armor. Setiap stack(s) meningkatkan ATK dan DEF sebesar 3%/3.5%/4%/4.5%/5%, dapat di stack(s) hingga 3/3/3/3/3 kali. Saat Resonator menerima damage, mengurangi jumlah stack(s) sebanyak 1/1/1/1/1.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Memberikan DMG kepada musuh dengan Negative Statuses meningkatkan ATK pengguna sebesar 4%/5%/6%/7%/8% selama 10/10/10/10/10 detik. Efek ini dapat dipicu 1 kali per detik, dapat di stack(s) hingga 4/4/4/4/4 kali.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Saat Resonance Skill dilancarkan, memulihkan 8/10/12/14/16 Concerto Energy. Efek ini dapat dipicu 1/1/1/1/1 kali setiap 20/20/20/20/20 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Meningkatkan ATK sebesar 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. Melancarkan Intro Skill atau Resonance Liberation meningkatkan Resonance Liberation DMG sebesar 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% selama 15/15/15/15/15 detik. Mendapatkan Shield memungkinkan Resonance Liberation DMG untuk mengabaikan 7.2%/8.4%/9.6%/10.8%/12.0% DEF target selama 7/7/7/7/7 detik, dapat di stack(s) hingga 5/5/5/5/5 kali. Efek ini dipicu sekali setiap 0.5/0.5/0.5/0.5/0.5 detik. Saat melancarkan Intro Skill, efek ini langsung mencapai stack(s) maksimum selama 3/3/3/3/3 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Meningkatkan ATK sebesar 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. Memberikan damage kepada target dalam status Tune Strain - Interfered memberikan 6%/6.7%/7.5%/8.2%/9% Basic Attack DMG Bonus selama 3/3/3/3/3 detik, dapat di stack(s) hingga 4/4/4/4/4 kali. Efek ini dapat dipicu 1/1/1/1/1 kali setiap 0.5/0.5/0.5/0.5/0.5 detik. Memicu ulang efek ini akan mengatur ulang durasinya.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Meningkatkan ATK sebesar 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. Melancarkan Intro Skill atau Echo Skill memberikan 32%/40%/48%/56%/64% Echo Skill DMG Amplification selama 15/15/15/15/15 detik. Saat memberikan Echo Skill DMG, Aero DMG mengabaikan 10%/12.5%/15%/17.5%/20% DEF target selama 6/6/6/6/6 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Melancarkan Resonance Skill meningkatkan Resonance Liberation DMG Bonus pengguna sebesar 18%/27%/36%/45%/54% selama 15/15/15/15/15 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Meningkatkan ATK sebesar 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. Setiap kali Basic Attack atau Intro Skill dilancarkan, Heavy Attack DMG Bonus meningkat sebesar 48%/60%/72%/84%/96% selama 3/3/3/3/3 detik.

passive.name: Weapon Skill
passive.description: Mendapatkan 12%/15%/18%/21%/24% Attribute DMG Bonus. Saat menggunakan Resonance Liberation, pengguna mendapatkan 48%/60%/72%/84%/96% Resonance Liberation DMG Bonus selama 8/8/8/8/8 detik. Efek ini dapat diperpanjang selama 5/5/5/5/5 detik setiap kali Resonance Skill dilancarkan, hingga 3/3/3/3/3 kali.
